parameters.jsCode: const j=$json;const h=j.headers||{};const fromText=(j.from&&(j.from.text||(j.from.value&&j.from.value[0]&&j.from.value[0].address)))||(typeof j.from==='string'?j.from:'')||'';const toText=(j.to&&(j.to.text||(j.to.value&&j.to.value[0]&&j.to.value[0].address)))||(typeof j.to==='string'?j.to:'')||'';const refs=Array.isArray(j.references)?j.references.join(' '):(j.references||h['references']||null);const atts=Array.isArray(j.attachments)?j.attachments.map(a=>a.filename||a.fileName).filter(Boolean):[];const html=typeof j.textHtml==='string'?j.textHtml:(typeof j.html==='string'?j.html:'');return {messageId:j.messageId||h['message-id']||'',inReplyTo:j.inReplyTo||h['in-reply-to']||null,references:refs,from:fromText,to:toText,subject:j.subject||'',bodyText:(typeof j.text==='string'&&j.text)?j.text:html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g,' ').trim(),attachmentNames:atts};
